name: academorix-shared/foundation
purpose: Server-side Laravel package for the shared foundation module, auto-generated from a blueprint and paired with the wire-visible SDK sibling.
capabilities: Consumers cross the service boundary through the SDK
when_to_use: When a consumer needs the server-side surface of the shared foundation module — models, repositories, actions, policies emitted from the blueprint.
when_not_to_use: For wire-side Saloon + Spatie Data contracts, use academorix-shared/foundation-sdk instead.
